⚙️ Leverage Configuration

Primary Sub-account (60%) — P3_invvol

SleevesCCI_ETH_4h, STF_AVAX_4h, STF_SOL_4h
Risk per trade3.0% of sub-account cash
Leverage cap3.0× (cash-notional ceiling)
WeightingInverse-volatility rolling 500-bar
RebalanceDaily, weights normalized to 1.0
Exit stackTP=10×ATR, SL=2×ATR, trail=6×ATR, max_hold=60 bars

Complement Sub-account (40%) — P5_btc_defensive

SleevesCCI_ETH_4h, LATBB_AVAX_4h, STF_SOL_4h
Risk per trade3.0% of sub-account cash
Leverage cap5.0× (raised to accommodate BTC boost)
Size multiplierBTC defensive regime gate (see below)
WeightingEqual-weight across 3 sleeves
Exit stackSame as P3 (audit-matched)

BTC Defensive Gate — applied per-bar to P5 sleeve sizing

BTC trendBTC vol quantileSize multiplierRationale
Trending (price+EMA50 both above/below EMA200)Low (< 50th pct, 500-bar rank)1.25×Best regime — add size
TrendingHigh (≥ 50th pct)0.75×Volatile trends — trim
ChoppyLow1.00×Quiet chop — baseline
ChoppyHigh0.40×Worst regime — reduce heavily
